title: Four Hundred Chapters on Love
description: Maximus' spiritual aphorisms: love is the highest form of knowledge, and perfect love casts out all self-interest.
introduction: Maximus' spiritual aphorisms: love is the highest form of knowledge, and perfect love casts out all self-interest.

translation.text: He who loves God prefers knowledge of God to all things made by God, and devotes himself to it constantly.
